__doc__: Per-field clinical descriptions for the schemas in scripts/data-pipeline/types.ts. Injected as `// comments` above each field at LLM-prompt-rendering time. Top-level keys match `schema.descriptorKey`; inner keys match field names. Empty `{}` for a cancer type means no descriptions yet — the renderer gracefully omits comments for fields without descriptions. Adding/removing a field requires editing types.ts first; this file is prose only.

PROSTATE.castrationStatus: Castration status. SENSITIVE = hormone-sensitive (HSPC), responsive to androgen deprivation. RESISTANT = castration-resistant (CRPC), progressing on castrate-level testosterone.
PROSTATE.metastaticStatus: Distant-metastasis status. METASTATIC = M1 (distant metastases on conventional imaging or PSMA PET). NON_METASTATIC = M0 (regional lymph nodes alone do not count as M1 in prostate).
PROSTATE.histology: Tumor histology. ADENOCARCINOMA = acinar or ductal adenocarcinoma. NEUROENDOCRINE_SMALL_CELL = neuroendocrine or small-cell prostate carcinoma.
PROSTATE.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
PROSTATE.psmaPetPositive: PSMA-avid disease on PET imaging (Ga-68 PSMA-11 or F-18 piflufolastat).
PROSTATE.hrrStatus: Homologous-recombination-repair pathway status. BRCA1 / BRCA2 = pathogenic alteration in those specific genes. OTHER_HRR = ATM, PALB2, CHEK2, RAD51, FANCA, etc. NEGATIVE = no HRR alteration.
PROSTATE.msiStatus: MSI_HIGH_DMMR = MSI-high or MMR-deficient by IHC. MSS_PMMR = microsatellite-stable / MMR-proficient.
PROSTATE.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. ARPI = androgen-receptor pathway inhibitor (abiraterone, enzalutamide, apalutamide, darolutamide). TAXANE = docetaxel or cabazitaxel. PSMA_RADIOLIGAND = Lu-177 PSMA-617. PARPI = olaparib, rucaparib, niraparib, talazoparib.
PROSTATE.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
PROSTATE.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the metastatic setting; counts cytotoxic and targeted regimens, not ADT alone.
PROSTATE.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the metastatic setting; counts cytotoxic and targeted regimens, not ADT alone.

UROTHELIAL.diseaseSetting: Disease state at enrollment. NMIBC = non-muscle-invasive (Ta, Tis, T1). MIBC = muscle-invasive (T2–T4 N0 M0). LOCALLY_ADVANCED = T4b or node-positive (N+ M0). METASTATIC = M1.
UROTHELIAL.site: Anatomic origin. BLADDER = urothelial carcinoma of the bladder. UPPER_TRACT = renal pelvis or ureter (UTUC). URETHRAL = primary urethral urothelial carcinoma.
UROTHELIAL.histology: Pathology subtype. PURE_UROTHELIAL = conventional transitional cell carcinoma. VARIANT_HISTOLOGY = micropapillary, plasmacytoid, sarcomatoid, nested, lymphoepithelioma-like, or other variants with retained urothelial differentiation. PURE_SQUAMOUS / PURE_NEUROENDOCRINE = non-urothelial primaries of the urinary tract.
UROTHELIAL.bcgStatus: Prior intravesical BCG exposure for NMIBC. NAIVE = never received BCG. EXPOSED = received BCG but not classified as unresponsive. UNRESPONSIVE = persistent or recurrent high-grade disease after adequate BCG per FDA criteria.
UROTHELIAL.cisplatinEligible: Cisplatin eligibility per Galsky criteria (ECOG ≤1, CrCl ≥60, no grade ≥2 neuropathy or hearing loss, no NYHA III heart failure).
UROTHELIAL.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
UROTHELIAL.fgfr3Status: FGFR3 alteration status. ALTERED = activating mutation (S249C, R248C, Y373C, etc.) or FGFR3 fusion. WILD_TYPE = no alteration.
UROTHELIAL.pdl1Status: PD-L1 expression by IHC (CPS or IC scoring per the trial's assay). POSITIVE / NEGATIVE at the trial's threshold.
UROTHELIAL.her2Status: HER2 expression by IHC and/or amplification by FISH. POSITIVE / NEGATIVE.
UROTHELIAL.nectin4Status: Nectin-4 expression by IHC. POSITIVE / NEGATIVE.
UROTHELIAL.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. PLATINUM = cisplatin or carboplatin. IMMUNOTHERAPY = anti-PD-1/PD-L1. ENFORTUMAB_VEDOTIN = enfortumab vedotin (Nectin-4 ADC). FGFR3_INHIBITOR = erdafitinib. RADICAL_CYSTECTOMY = surgical bladder removal.
UROTHELIAL.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
UROTHELIAL.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.
UROTHELIAL.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.

RCC.histologySubtype: Renal cell carcinoma histology. CLEAR_CELL = clear-cell RCC. PAPILLARY = papillary RCC (type 1 or type 2). CHROMOPHOBE = chromophobe RCC. OTHER_NON_CLEAR_CELL = collecting duct, medullary, MiT-family translocation, unclassified, etc.
RCC.sarcomatoidFeatures: Presence of sarcomatoid dedifferentiation in the tumor (any percentage).
RCC.diseaseSetting: LOCALIZED = T1–3 N0 M0. LOCALLY_ADVANCED = T4 or N+ M0. METASTATIC = M1 disease.
RCC.imdcRisk: IMDC (International Metastatic RCC Database Consortium) risk score. Based on six factors: time from diagnosis to systemic therapy <1y, Karnofsky <80, low hemoglobin, high calcium, high ANC, high platelets. FAVORABLE = 0 factors. INTERMEDIATE = 1–2. POOR = ≥3.
RCC.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
RCC.cnsMetastases: Brain metastases status. ABSENT = no known CNS lesions. TREATED_STABLE = previously treated, currently stable / asymptomatic, off steroids. ACTIVE = untreated or progressing.
RCC.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. NEPHRECTOMY = prior radical or partial nephrectomy. VEGF_TKI = sunitinib, pazopanib, cabozantinib, axitinib, lenvatinib, tivozanib. IMMUNOTHERAPY_METASTATIC = anti-PD-1/PD-L1 ± ipilimumab in the metastatic setting. IMMUNOTHERAPY_ADJUVANT = adjuvant pembrolizumab post-nephrectomy. HIF2A_INHIBITOR = belzutifan. MTOR_INHIBITOR = everolimus, temsirolimus.
RCC.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
RCC.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.
RCC.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.

TESTICULAR.histology: Germ-cell tumor histology. SEMINOMA = pure seminoma. NON_SEMINOMA = nonseminomatous germ-cell tumor (embryonal carcinoma, yolk sac, choriocarcinoma, teratoma, or mixed).
TESTICULAR.diseaseSetting: STAGE_I = organ-confined post-orchiectomy. METASTATIC_INITIAL = newly diagnosed metastatic disease. RELAPSED_REFRACTORY = progression after first-line platinum chemotherapy.
TESTICULAR.igcccgRisk: IGCCCG prognostic classification (good / intermediate / poor) based on tumor markers (AFP, β-hCG, LDH), primary site (mediastinal nonseminoma is poor), and non-pulmonary visceral metastases.
TESTICULAR.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. PLATINUM_CHEMOTHERAPY = BEP (bleomycin/etoposide/cisplatin) or EP. HDCT_ASCT = high-dose chemotherapy with autologous stem-cell rescue.
TESTICULAR.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
TESTICULAR.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic regimens for relapsed/refractory disease.
TESTICULAR.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic regimens for relapsed/refractory disease.

BREAST.hrStatus: Hormone-receptor status (ER and/or PR). POSITIVE = ≥1% nuclear staining for ER or PR by IHC per ASCO/CAP. NEGATIVE = both ER and PR <1%.
BREAST.her2Status: HER2 status per ASCO/CAP. POSITIVE = IHC 3+ or ISH-amplified (HER2/CEP17 ≥2.0 with HER2 copy number ≥4.0). NEGATIVE = HER2-low or HER2-zero.
BREAST.her2LowOrUltralowStatus: Granular HER2-low/ultralow stratification. NEGATIVE = HER2 0 by IHC. ULTRA_LOW = IHC 0 with faint membrane staining. LOW = IHC 1+ or 2+/ISH-.
BREAST.diseaseSetting: Stage of disease. NEOADJUVANT = before primary surgery. ADJUVANT = post-surgery, no metastatic disease. LOCALLY_ADVANCED = inoperable locoregional disease without distant metastases. METASTATIC = M1.
BREAST.cnsMetastases: ABSENT = no CNS lesions. TREATED_STABLE = previously treated (WBRT/SRS/surgery), asymptomatic, off steroids. ACTIVE = untreated, progressing, or symptomatic.
BREAST.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
BREAST.menopausalStatus: PRE = premenopausal (cycling, evidence of ovarian function). PERI = perimenopausal. POST = postmenopausal (age ≥55 with amenorrhea ≥12 months OR younger with documented bilateral oophorectomy or FSH and estradiol in the postmenopausal range).
BREAST.brcaStatus: Germline or somatic BRCA1/2 alteration. GERMLINE = pathogenic germline variant. SOMATIC = tumor-only pathogenic variant. NEGATIVE = no pathogenic variant.
BREAST.pi3kAktPathwayStatus: PI3K/AKT/PTEN pathway status. ALTERED = activating PIK3CA mutation, AKT1 E17K, or PTEN loss. WILD_TYPE = no alteration.
BREAST.esr1Status: ESR1 ligand-binding-domain mutation status (Y537S/N, D538G, E380Q, etc.) detected on tissue or ctDNA. MUTATED / WILD_TYPE.
BREAST.pdl1Status: PD-L1 expression by IHC (CPS or IC scoring per the trial's assay, e.g. SP142, 22C3). POSITIVE / NEGATIVE at the trial's threshold.
BREAST.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. ENDOCRINE_THERAPY = aromatase inhibitor, tamoxifen, fulvestrant, elacestrant. CDK46_INHIBITOR = palbociclib, ribociclib, abemaciclib. CHEMOTHERAPY_ADVANCED = chemotherapy given for metastatic disease. HER2_DIRECTED_THERAPY = trastuzumab, pertuzumab, T-DM1, T-DXd, tucatinib, lapatinib, margetuximab. ANTIBODY_DRUG_CONJUGATE = T-DXd, sacituzumab govitecan, datopotamab deruxtecan, disitamab vedotin.
BREAST.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
BREAST.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.
BREAST.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.

LUNG.histology: Lung cancer histology. NSCLC_NONSQUAMOUS = adenocarcinoma and other non-squamous NSCLC. NSCLC_SQUAMOUS = squamous-cell NSCLC. SCLC = small-cell lung cancer.
LUNG.metastaticStatus: EARLY_STAGE = resectable I–II. LOCALLY_ADVANCED = stage III. METASTATIC = stage IV / M1.
LUNG.sclcExtent: Veterans Affairs staging for SCLC. LIMITED = disease confinable to a single radiation port. EXTENSIVE = beyond a single port.
LUNG.cnsMetastases: ABSENT / TREATED_STABLE (prior WBRT/SRS, asymptomatic, off steroids) / ACTIVE (untreated or progressing).
LUNG.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
LUNG.egfrStatus: EGFR mutation status. CLASSICAL_DEL19_L858R = exon 19 deletion or exon 21 L858R. EXON20_INS = exon 20 insertion. UNCOMMON = G719X, L861Q, S768I, T790M alone, etc. WILD_TYPE = no EGFR mutation.
LUNG.alkStatus: ALK fusion / rearrangement by FISH, IHC, or NGS. REARRANGED / WILD_TYPE.
LUNG.krasStatus: KRAS mutation status. G12C / G12D / OTHER_KRAS (G12V, G12R, G13, Q61, etc.) / WILD_TYPE.
LUNG.brafStatus: BRAF mutation status. V600E / V600K / OTHER_V600 (V600D, V600R, etc.) / NON_V600 (G469, K601, fusions, etc.) / WILD_TYPE.
LUNG.metStatus: MET alteration status. EXON14_SKIPPING = MET exon 14 skipping mutation. AMPLIFIED = high-level MET amplification. WILD_TYPE = no MET alteration.
LUNG.her2Status: HER2 alteration status. MUTATED = HER2 exon 20 insertion or other activating mutation. AMPLIFIED = HER2 copy-number gain by FISH/NGS. OVEREXPRESSED = IHC 3+ or 2+/ISH-amplified protein expression. WILD_TYPE = no HER2 alteration.
LUNG.pdl1TpsCategory: PD-L1 Tumor Proportion Score by 22C3 IHC. HIGH_GE_50 = ≥50%. INTERMEDIATE_1_49 = 1–49%. NEGATIVE_LT_1 = <1%.
LUNG.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. PLATINUM_CHEMOTHERAPY = carboplatin/cisplatin doublet. IMMUNOTHERAPY = anti-PD-1/PD-L1. TARGETED_THERAPY = any oncogene-matched TKI or mAb. OSIMERTINIB = osimertinib (third-generation EGFR TKI).
LUNG.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
LUNG.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.
LUNG.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.

COLORECTAL.primarySiteSidedness: Primary tumor site. RIGHT_COLON = cecum, ascending, transverse (proximal to splenic flexure). LEFT_COLON = descending, sigmoid. RECTUM = within ~15 cm of the anal verge.
COLORECTAL.diseaseSetting: EARLY_STAGE = resected stage I–III. LOCALLY_ADVANCED = T4 or N+ where neoadjuvant or definitive chemoradiation is considered. METASTATIC = stage IV / M1.
COLORECTAL.histology: ADENOCARCINOMA = standard glandular histology. OTHER = signet-ring, mucinous (when called out), neuroendocrine, anal squamous, etc.
COLORECTAL.liverLimitedDisease: Metastatic disease confined to the liver, with no extrahepatic spread.
COLORECTAL.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
COLORECTAL.krasStatus: KRAS mutation status. G12C / G12D / OTHER_KRAS (G12V, G12R, G13, Q61, etc.) / WILD_TYPE.
COLORECTAL.nrasStatus: NRAS mutation status. G12C / G12D / Q61K / Q61R / OTHER_NRAS / WILD_TYPE.
COLORECTAL.brafStatus: BRAF mutation status. V600E / V600K / OTHER_V600 / NON_V600 (G469, K601, fusions, etc.) / WILD_TYPE.
COLORECTAL.msiStatus: MSI_HIGH_DMMR = MSI-high or MMR-deficient by IHC. MSS_PMMR = microsatellite-stable / MMR-proficient.
COLORECTAL.her2Status: HER2 alteration status. MUTATED = HER2 activating mutation. AMPLIFIED = HER2 amplification by FISH/NGS. OVEREXPRESSED = IHC 3+ or 2+/ISH-amplified. WILD_TYPE = no HER2 alteration.
COLORECTAL.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. FLUOROPYRIMIDINE = 5-FU or capecitabine. OXALIPLATIN = oxaliplatin (e.g. FOLFOX, CAPOX). IRINOTECAN = irinotecan (e.g. FOLFIRI). ANTI_EGFR = cetuximab or panitumumab. ANTI_VEGF = bevacizumab. IMMUNOTHERAPY = anti-PD-1/PD-L1. BRAF_COMBINATION_THERAPY = encorafenib + cetuximab.
COLORECTAL.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
COLORECTAL.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.
COLORECTAL.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.

HEAD_AND_NECK.primarySite: Anatomic origin. ORAL_CAVITY = lip, tongue, floor of mouth, buccal. OROPHARYNX = tonsil, base of tongue, soft palate. LARYNX = supraglottic/glottic/subglottic. HYPOPHARYNX. NASOPHARYNX. SALIVARY_GLAND = parotid, submandibular, or minor salivary glands.
HEAD_AND_NECK.diseaseSetting: LOCALLY_ADVANCED = stage III–IVB amenable to curative-intent chemoradiation. RECURRENT = locoregional recurrence after definitive therapy. METASTATIC = distant spread.
HEAD_AND_NECK.hpvP16Status: p16 IHC as a surrogate for HPV-driven disease. POSITIVE = strong/diffuse p16 staining or HPV ISH+. NEGATIVE = p16- / HPV-.
HEAD_AND_NECK.ebvStatus: EBV status by ISH on tumor. POSITIVE / NEGATIVE.
HEAD_AND_NECK.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
HEAD_AND_NECK.pdl1CpsCategory: PD-L1 Combined Positive Score by 22C3 IHC. HIGH_GE_20 = CPS ≥20. INTERMEDIATE_1_19 = CPS 1–19. NEGATIVE_LT_1 = CPS <1.
HEAD_AND_NECK.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. RADIATION = prior head-and-neck radiotherapy. PLATINUM = cisplatin or carboplatin. IMMUNOTHERAPY = anti-PD-1/PD-L1.
HEAD_AND_NECK.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
HEAD_AND_NECK.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the recurrent/metastatic setting.
HEAD_AND_NECK.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the recurrent/metastatic setting.

OVARIAN.histology: Epithelial ovarian cancer histology. HIGH_GRADE_SEROUS = HGSOC. LOW_GRADE_SEROUS. MUCINOUS. CLEAR_CELL. ENDOMETRIOID.
OVARIAN.diseaseSetting: NEWLY_DIAGNOSED = initial diagnosis through first-line chemotherapy. MAINTENANCE = post-first-line response. RECURRENT = relapse after at least one prior platinum-based regimen.
OVARIAN.platinumSensitivity: Defined by platinum-free interval after the last platinum exposure. SENSITIVE = >6 months. RESISTANT = <6 months. REFRACTORY = progression during platinum therapy or within 4 weeks of completion.
OVARIAN.brcaStatus: Germline or somatic BRCA1/2 pathogenic variant. GERMLINE / SOMATIC / NEGATIVE.
OVARIAN.hrdStatus: Homologous-recombination-deficiency status by tumor genomic-instability assay (e.g. Myriad MyChoice). POSITIVE = HRD+ (BRCA or composite GIS-positive). NEGATIVE = HR-proficient.
OVARIAN.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (CA-125 alone does not count).
OVARIAN.cnsMetastases: ABSENT / TREATED_STABLE (prior treatment, off steroids) / ACTIVE.
OVARIAN.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. DEBULKING = primary or interval cytoreductive surgery. PLATINUM = carboplatin or cisplatin. BEVACIZUMAB = bevacizumab. PARPI = olaparib, niraparib, rucaparib.
OVARIAN.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.

UTERINE.histology: Endometrial / uterine carcinoma histology. ENDOMETRIOID. SEROUS. CARCINOSARCOMA = malignant mixed Müllerian tumor (MMMT). CLEAR_CELL.
UTERINE.diseaseSetting: EARLY_STAGE = resectable I–II. LOCALLY_ADVANCED = III/IVA without distant spread. RECURRENT = post-curative-intent recurrence. METASTATIC = IVB / M1.
UTERINE.tcgaMolecularClass: TCGA endometrial molecular class. POLE_ULTRAMUTATED = POLE exonuclease-domain mutation. MSI_HYPERMUTATED_DMMR = MMR-deficient. COPY_NUMBER_LOW_NSMP = no specific molecular profile. COPY_NUMBER_HIGH_P53ABN = p53-abnormal.
UTERINE.msiStatus: MSI_HIGH_DMMR = MSI-high or MMR-deficient. MSS_PMMR = microsatellite-stable / MMR-proficient.
UTERINE.her2Status: HER2 status by IHC ± ISH. POSITIVE = IHC 3+ or ISH-amplified. NEGATIVE.
UTERINE.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
UTERINE.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. RADIATION = prior pelvic external beam or brachytherapy. PLATINUM = carboplatin or cisplatin. IMMUNOTHERAPY = anti-PD-1/PD-L1.
UTERINE.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
UTERINE.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/recurrent setting.
UTERINE.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/recurrent setting.

CERVICAL.histology: Cervical cancer histology. SQUAMOUS = squamous cell carcinoma. ADENOCARCINOMA = glandular. ADENOSQUAMOUS = mixed.
CERVICAL.diseaseSetting: LOCALLY_ADVANCED = IB3–IVA. RECURRENT = post-curative-intent recurrence. METASTATIC = IVB / M1.
CERVICAL.hpvStatus: HPV-association status by HR-HPV PCR or ISH. POSITIVE / NEGATIVE.
CERVICAL.pdl1CpsCategory: PD-L1 Combined Positive Score by 22C3 IHC. POSITIVE_GE_1 = CPS ≥1. NEGATIVE_LT_1 = CPS <1.
CERVICAL.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
CERVICAL.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. CHEMORADIATION = concurrent cisplatin + external-beam pelvic RT ± brachytherapy. PLATINUM = cisplatin or carboplatin. IMMUNOTHERAPY = anti-PD-1/PD-L1.
CERVICAL.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
CERVICAL.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/recurrent setting.
CERVICAL.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/recurrent setting.

MELANOMA.primarySite: CUTANEOUS = skin-origin. MUCOSAL = head-neck, anorectal, or urogenital mucosa. UVEAL = eye-origin. ACRAL = palms, soles, or nail beds.
MELANOMA.diseaseSetting: RESECTED_ADJUVANT = stage IIB–IV NED post-resection. UNRESECTABLE = stage III unresectable. METASTATIC = stage IV / M1.
MELANOMA.brafStatus: BRAF mutation status. V600E / V600K / OTHER_V600 / NON_V600 / WILD_TYPE.
MELANOMA.nrasStatus: NRAS mutation status (typically Q61). MUTATED / WILD_TYPE.
MELANOMA.ldhCategory: Serum LDH per AJCC M-staging. NORMAL. ELEVATED_1_2X_ULN = 1–2× ULN. ELEVATED_GT_2X_ULN = >2× ULN.
MELANOMA.cnsMetastases: ABSENT / TREATED_STABLE (prior SRS/WBRT, off steroids, asymptomatic) / ACTIVE.
MELANOMA.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
MELANOMA.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. IMMUNOTHERAPY = anti-PD-1 (nivolumab, pembrolizumab) ± anti-CTLA-4 (ipilimumab) ± anti-LAG-3 (relatlimab). BRAF_MEK_INHIBITOR = dabrafenib + trametinib, encorafenib + binimetinib, or vemurafenib + cobimetinib.
MELANOMA.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
MELANOMA.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.
MELANOMA.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.

MESOTHELIOMA.histology: Mesothelioma histology. EPITHELIOID. SARCOMATOID = spindled. BIPHASIC = mixed epithelioid and sarcomatoid components.
MESOTHELIOMA.diseaseSetting: RESECTABLE = candidate for pleurectomy/decortication or peritoneal CRS-HIPEC. UNRESECTABLE = locoregional disease not amenable to resection. METASTATIC = distant spread.
MESOTHELIOMA.bap1Status: BAP1 tumor-suppressor status by IHC or NGS. LOST = BAP1-deficient. INTACT = BAP1-proficient.
MESOTHELIOMA.measurableDiseaseModifiedRecist: Modified RECIST for pleural mesothelioma — sums of linear measurements at three levels in the pleural rind.
MESOTHELIOMA.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. PLATINUM = cisplatin or carboplatin. PEMETREXED = pemetrexed. IMMUNOTHERAPY = ipilimumab + nivolumab or single-agent anti-PD-1/PD-L1.
MESOTHELIOMA.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.

GASTROESOPHAGEAL.primarySiteHistology: Combined site + histology. ESOPHAGEAL_SQUAMOUS = ESCC. ESOPHAGEAL_ADENOCARCINOMA = esophageal adenocarcinoma. GEJ_ADENOCARCINOMA = gastroesophageal junction adenocarcinoma (Siewert I–III). GASTRIC_ADENOCARCINOMA = gastric adenocarcinoma. OTHER = signet-ring–dominant, neuroendocrine, GIST when called out, etc.
GASTROESOPHAGEAL.diseaseSetting: NEOADJUVANT = pre-operative. PERIOPERATIVE = peri-operative chemotherapy bracketing surgery. LOCALLY_ADVANCED = unresectable locoregional. METASTATIC = M1.
GASTROESOPHAGEAL.her2Status: HER2 status by IHC ± ISH. POSITIVE = IHC 3+ or 2+/ISH-amplified. NEGATIVE.
GASTROESOPHAGEAL.pdl1CpsCategory: PD-L1 Combined Positive Score by 22C3 IHC. HIGH_GE_10 = CPS ≥10. INTERMEDIATE_1_9 = CPS 1–9. NEGATIVE_LT_1 = CPS <1.
GASTROESOPHAGEAL.msiStatus: MSI_HIGH_DMMR = MSI-high or MMR-deficient. MSS_PMMR = microsatellite-stable / MMR-proficient.
GASTROESOPHAGEAL.claudin18_2Status: Claudin 18.2 expression by IHC (typically ≥75% of tumor cells with moderate-to-strong staining). POSITIVE / NEGATIVE.
GASTROESOPHAGEAL.fgfr2bStatus: FGFR2b expression by IHC. OVEREXPRESSED / NEGATIVE.
GASTROESOPHAGEAL.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
GASTROESOPHAGEAL.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. FLUOROPYRIMIDINE = 5-FU or capecitabine. PLATINUM = cisplatin or oxaliplatin. IMMUNOTHERAPY = anti-PD-1/PD-L1. HER2_DIRECTED_THERAPY = trastuzumab, T-DXd.
GASTROESOPHAGEAL.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
GASTROESOPHAGEAL.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.
GASTROESOPHAGEAL.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.

NEUROENDOCRINE.primarySite: PANCREATIC = pancreatic NET (pNET). GI_MIDGUT = jejunum, ileum, appendix, proximal colon. GI_HINDGUT = distal colon, rectum. LUNG = bronchial typical or atypical carcinoid. OTHER = thymic, paraganglioma, medullary thyroid carcinoma when included.
NEUROENDOCRINE.differentiation: WELL_DIFFERENTIATED = NET (retains neuroendocrine architecture). POORLY_DIFFERENTIATED = neuroendocrine carcinoma (NEC).
NEUROENDOCRINE.grade: WHO grade by Ki67 and mitotic rate. G1 = Ki67 <3%, mitoses <2/10 HPF. G2 = Ki67 3–20%, mitoses 2–20/10 HPF. G3 = Ki67 >20% or mitoses >20/10 HPF.
NEUROENDOCRINE.ki67Percent: Ki67 proliferation index as a numeric percentage.
NEUROENDOCRINE.functionalStatus: FUNCTIONAL = hormone-secreting with a clinical syndrome (carcinoid, insulinoma, gastrinoma, glucagonoma, VIPoma, etc.) or measurable hormone excess. NON_FUNCTIONAL = no hormonal syndrome.
NEUROENDOCRINE.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
NEUROENDOCRINE.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. SOMATOSTATIN_ANALOG = octreotide LAR or lanreotide. CHEMOTHERAPY = CAPTEM, FOLFOX, platinum-etoposide, streptozocin-based, etc. PRRT = peptide receptor radionuclide therapy (Lu-177 DOTATATE). EVEROLIMUS = everolimus (mTOR inhibitor).
NEUROENDOCRINE.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
NEUROENDOCRINE.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.
NEUROENDOCRINE.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.

PANCREATIC.resectability: Surgical-anatomic categorization (NCCN). RESECTABLE = no major vascular contact. BORDERLINE = limited venous or arterial contact. LOCALLY_ADVANCED = unresectable due to vascular involvement, no distant disease. METASTATIC = M1.
PANCREATIC.histology: ADENOCARCINOMA = pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). OTHER = acinar, adenosquamous, signet-ring, etc.
PANCREATIC.krasStatus: KRAS mutation status. G12C / G12D / OTHER_KRAS (G12V, G12R, Q61, etc.) / WILD_TYPE.
PANCREATIC.brcaStatus: Germline or somatic BRCA1/2 alteration. GERMLINE / SOMATIC / NEGATIVE.
PANCREATIC.msiStatus: MSI_HIGH_DMMR = MSI-high or MMR-deficient. MSS_PMMR = microsatellite-stable / MMR-proficient.
PANCREATIC.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
PANCREATIC.ca199Elevated: Serum CA 19-9 above the trial-specified threshold (commonly ≥1.5× or ≥2× ULN).
PANCREATIC.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. FOLFIRINOX = 5-FU/leucovorin/irinotecan/oxaliplatin or modified mFOLFIRINOX/NALIRIFOX. GEMCITABINE_NABPACLITAXEL = gemcitabine + nab-paclitaxel. IMMUNOTHERAPY = anti-PD-1/PD-L1.
PANCREATIC.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
PANCREATIC.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.
PANCREATIC.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.

CNS.histology: Primary CNS tumor pathology. GLIOBLASTOMA = WHO grade 4 IDH-wildtype astrocytoma. ASTROCYTOMA = IDH-mutant astrocytoma (grades 2–4). OLIGODENDROGLIOMA = IDH-mutant, 1p/19q-codeleted. EPENDYMOMA. MEDULLOBLASTOMA. MENINGIOMA. PRIMARY_CNS_LYMPHOMA = PCNSL. OTHER.
CNS.diseaseStatus: NEWLY_DIAGNOSED = no prior treatment beyond initial surgery. RECURRENT_PROGRESSIVE = radiographic or clinical progression after prior therapy.
CNS.idhStatus: IDH mutation status. IDH1_MUTATED = R132 IDH1 mutation. IDH2_MUTATED = R140 or R172 IDH2 mutation. WILD_TYPE = no IDH alteration. Multi-select if both isoforms are permitted.
CNS.codeletion1p19q: 1p/19q codeletion status by FISH or NGS.
CNS.egfrAmplified: EGFR amplification by FISH or NGS.
CNS.brafStatus: BRAF mutation status. V600E / V600K / OTHER_V600 / NON_V600 / WILD_TYPE.
CNS.measurableDiseaseRano: RANO measurable disease — a contrast-enhancing lesion ≥10 mm in two perpendicular diameters.
CNS.resectionExtent: BIOPSY_ONLY = stereotactic or open biopsy without significant tumor removal. SUBTOTAL = partial resection with residual contrast-enhancing tumor. GROSS_TOTAL = complete resection of contrast-enhancing tumor (>95% by post-op MRI within 72 h).
CNS.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. RADIOTHERAPY = prior cranial radiation. TEMOZOLOMIDE = temozolomide. BEVACIZUMAB = bevacizumab. TTFIELDS = tumor-treating fields (Optune device).
CNS.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
CNS.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines for recurrent disease.
CNS.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines for recurrent disease.

HCC.diseaseSetting: RESECTABLE = candidate for resection, transplant, or ablation. LOCALLY_ADVANCED = intermediate/advanced disease confined to the liver. METASTATIC = extrahepatic spread.
HCC.childPughClass: Child-Pugh score for liver function. A / B / C.
HCC.bclcStage: Barcelona Clinic Liver Cancer stage. 0 = very early (single <2 cm). A = early. B = intermediate. C = advanced (portal-vein invasion or extrahepatic spread). D = terminal.
HCC.viralHepatitisStatus: Underlying viral etiology. HBV / HCV / NONE.
HCC.portalVeinInvasion: Macrovascular invasion of the portal vein (Vp1–Vp4).
HCC.afpElevated: Alpha-fetoprotein above the trial-specified threshold (commonly ≥400 ng/mL).
HCC.priorLocoregionalTherapy: Any prior TACE, TARE/Y-90, RFA, MWA, or cryoablation.
HCC.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (some HCC trials also use mRECIST, which credits enhancing-tumor changes).
HCC.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. ATEZOLIZUMAB_BEVACIZUMAB = atezolizumab + bevacizumab. TKI = sorafenib, lenvatinib, regorafenib, cabozantinib. IMMUNOTHERAPY = anti-PD-1/PD-L1 (durvalumab + tremelimumab, nivolumab, pembrolizumab). TRANSARTERIAL_THERAPY = TACE or TARE/Y-90.
HCC.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
HCC.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.
HCC.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.

BILIARY.primarySite: INTRAHEPATIC_CHOLANGIO = intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma (iCCA). EXTRAHEPATIC_CHOLANGIO = perihilar or distal extrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma. GALLBLADDER = gallbladder carcinoma. AMPULLARY = ampulla of Vater.
BILIARY.fgfr2Status: FGFR2 fusion or rearrangement status. FUSION / WILD_TYPE.
BILIARY.idhStatus: IDH mutation status. IDH1_MUTATED = R132 IDH1 mutation. IDH2_MUTATED = R140 or R172 IDH2 mutation. WILD_TYPE = no IDH alteration. Multi-select if both isoforms are permitted.
BILIARY.her2Status: HER2 status. POSITIVE = IHC 3+ or 2+/ISH-amplified. NEGATIVE.
BILIARY.brafStatus: BRAF mutation status. V600E / V600K / OTHER_V600 / NON_V600 / WILD_TYPE.
BILIARY.krasStatus: KRAS mutation status. G12C / G12D / OTHER_KRAS (G12V, G12R, G13, Q61, etc.) / WILD_TYPE.
BILIARY.msiStatus: MSI_HIGH_DMMR = MSI-high or MMR-deficient. MSS_PMMR = microsatellite-stable / MMR-proficient.
BILIARY.measurableDiseaseRecist: RECIST 1.1 measurable disease (target lesion ≥1 cm on CT, ≥1.5 cm short axis for nodes).
BILIARY.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. GEMCITABINE_CISPLATIN = gemcitabine + cisplatin. IMMUNOTHERAPY = anti-PD-1/PD-L1. FGFR_INHIBITOR = pemigatinib, futibatinib. IDH1_INHIBITOR = ivosidenib.
BILIARY.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
BILIARY.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.
BILIARY.maxPriorSystemicLines: Maximum prior systemic lines in the advanced/metastatic setting.

MATURE_B_CELL.acceptedDiseases: Specific mature B-cell entities the trial enrolls. DLBCL_NOS = diffuse large B-cell lymphoma, NOS. HGBCL = high-grade B-cell lymphoma. HGBCL_DH_TH = double- or triple-hit. PMBCL = primary mediastinal large B-cell lymphoma. DLBCL_LEG_TYPE. TCRBCL = T-cell/histiocyte-rich large B-cell lymphoma. TRANSFORMED_FL / TRANSFORMED_MZL. RICHTER = Richter transformation of CLL. FL = follicular lymphoma. MCL = mantle cell lymphoma. MZL = marginal zone lymphoma. CHL = classic Hodgkin lymphoma. CLL_SLL = chronic lymphocytic leukemia / small lymphocytic lymphoma. WALDENSTROM = lymphoplasmacytic lymphoma / Waldenström macroglobulinemia. HCL = hairy cell leukemia. OTHER.
MATURE_B_CELL.cellOfOrigin: DLBCL cell-of-origin by Hans algorithm IHC or gene-expression profiling. GCB = germinal-center B-cell-like. NON_GCB_ABC = activated B-cell-like / ABC.
MATURE_B_CELL.doubleOrTripleHit: MYC rearrangement plus BCL2 and/or BCL6 rearrangement by FISH.
MATURE_B_CELL.ighvStatus: IGHV (immunoglobulin heavy-chain variable-region) mutation status in CLL. MUTATED = ≥2% divergence from germline. UNMUTATED = <2%.
MATURE_B_CELL.del17pOrTp53Mutated: del(17p) by FISH or TP53 mutation by NGS.
MATURE_B_CELL.myd88Status: MYD88 status. L265P = MYD88 L265P mutation present. WILD_TYPE.
MATURE_B_CELL.cnsInvolvement: Active CNS lymphoma involvement (parenchymal or leptomeningeal).
MATURE_B_CELL.cd19Positive: CD19 surface expression by IHC or flow cytometry.
MATURE_B_CELL.transplantEligible: Fit for high-dose chemotherapy with autologous or allogeneic stem-cell transplant (age, performance status, organ function, donor availability).
MATURE_B_CELL.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. ANTI_CD20 = rituximab, obinutuzumab. ANTI_CD19 = tafasitamab. BTK_INHIBITOR = ibrutinib, acalabrutinib, zanubrutinib, pirtobrutinib. BCL2_INHIBITOR = venetoclax. ANTHRACYCLINE = doxorubicin-containing (e.g. R-CHOP). BISPECIFIC = epcoritamab, glofitamab, mosunetuzumab. CAR_T = axi-cel, liso-cel, tisa-cel, brexu-cel. AUTO_TRANSPLANT = autologous SCT. ALLO_TRANSPLANT = allogeneic SCT.
MATURE_B_CELL.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
MATURE_B_CELL.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines (counts induction, salvage, and maintenance regimens; does not count the transplant itself).

MATURE_T_NK_CELL.acceptedDiseases: Specific mature T/NK entities the trial enrolls. PTCL_NOS = peripheral T-cell lymphoma, NOS. AITL = angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma. ALCL_ALK_POS / ALCL_ALK_NEG = anaplastic large-cell lymphoma by ALK status. CTCL_MF = mycosis fungoides. CTCL_SS = Sézary syndrome. NK_T = extranodal NK/T-cell lymphoma, nasal type. HSTCL = hepatosplenic T-cell lymphoma. MEITL = monomorphic epitheliotropic intestinal T-cell lymphoma. EATL = enteropathy-associated T-cell lymphoma. ATL = adult T-cell leukemia/lymphoma. OTHER.
MATURE_T_NK_CELL.atlSubtype: ATL Shimoyama clinical subtype. ACUTE / LYMPHOMATOUS / CHRONIC / SMOLDERING.
MATURE_T_NK_CELL.cd30Positive: CD30 surface expression by IHC (threshold trial-dependent).
MATURE_T_NK_CELL.cnsInvolvement: Active CNS lymphoma involvement (parenchymal or leptomeningeal).
MATURE_T_NK_CELL.ctclStageAdvanced: CTCL / mycosis fungoides Olsen stage IIB–IV (tumor-stage cutaneous, erythrodermic, or with nodal/visceral involvement).
MATURE_T_NK_CELL.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. BRENTUXIMAB = brentuximab vedotin. MOGAMULIZUMAB = anti-CCR4. CHEMOTHERAPY = CHOP/CHOEP/EPOCH-based regimens, romidepsin, pralatrexate, gemcitabine-based, etc. AUTO_TRANSPLANT = autologous SCT. ALLO_TRANSPLANT = allogeneic SCT.
MATURE_T_NK_CELL.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.

MYELOID_NEOPLASM.acceptedDiseases: Specific myeloid entities the trial enrolls. AML. MDS = myelodysplastic syndrome. CMML = chronic myelomonocytic leukemia. MDS_MPN = MDS/MPN overlap. MPN_PV = polycythemia vera. MPN_ET = essential thrombocythemia. MPN_MF = myelofibrosis (primary or post-PV/ET). CML = chronic myeloid leukemia. OTHER.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.amlClassification: AML ontogeny. DE_NOVO = no antecedent disease. SECONDARY = AML evolved from MDS, MPN, or CMML. THERAPY_RELATED = t-AML after prior cytotoxic chemotherapy or radiation.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.elnRisk: European LeukemiaNet 2022 cytogenetic + molecular risk for AML. FAVORABLE / INTERMEDIATE / ADVERSE.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.flt3Status: FLT3 mutation status. ITD = internal tandem duplication. TKD = D835 tyrosine-kinase domain mutation. WILD_TYPE.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.idhStatus: IDH mutation status. IDH1_MUTATED = R132 IDH1 mutation. IDH2_MUTATED = R140 or R172 IDH2 mutation. WILD_TYPE = no IDH alteration. Multi-select if both isoforms are permitted.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.kmt2aRearranged: KMT2A (MLL) rearrangement by FISH or karyotype.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.ipssR: IPSS-R (Revised International Prognostic Scoring System) for MDS. VERY_LOW / LOW / INT / HIGH / VERY_HIGH.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.ipssM: IPSS-M (Molecular IPSS) for MDS. VERY_LOW / LOW / MODERATE_LOW / MODERATE_HIGH / HIGH / VERY_HIGH.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.minBlastsPercent: Minimum bone-marrow or peripheral-blood blast percentage.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.maxBlastsPercent: Maximum bone-marrow or peripheral-blood blast percentage.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.ringSideroblasts: Ring sideroblasts ≥15% on bone-marrow iron stain (or ≥5% with SF3B1 mutation).
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.jak2Status: JAK2 mutation status. V617F / EXON12 / WILD_TYPE.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.cmlPhase: CML phase. CHRONIC / ACCELERATED / BLAST (≥20% blasts).
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.tp53Mutated: TP53 mutation by NGS or del(17p).
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. HMA = hypomethylating agent (azacitidine, decitabine). VENETOCLAX = venetoclax. INTENSIVE_CHEMOTHERAPY = 7+3 induction or similar. FLT3_INHIBITOR = midostaurin, quizartinib, gilteritinib. IDH_INHIBITOR = ivosidenib, enasidenib, olutasidenib. MENIN_INHIBITOR = revumenib. JAK_INHIBITOR = ruxolitinib, fedratinib, pacritinib, momelotinib. BCR_ABL_TKI = imatinib, dasatinib, nilotinib, bosutinib, ponatinib, asciminib. ALLO_TRANSPLANT = allogeneic SCT.
MYELOID_NEOPLASM.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.

PRECURSOR_LYMPHOID.acceptedDiseases: Specific precursor lymphoid entities the trial enrolls. B_ALL = B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia. T_ALL = T-cell ALL. LBL_B / LBL_T = B- or T-cell lymphoblastic lymphoma (tissue-predominant counterpart of ALL). OTHER.
PRECURSOR_LYMPHOID.philadelphiaStatus: BCR-ABL1 / Ph status in B-ALL. POSITIVE = Ph+. PH_LIKE = Ph-like B-ALL (kinase-activating gene-expression signature without BCR-ABL1). NEGATIVE = Ph-.
PRECURSOR_LYMPHOID.cd19Positive: CD19 surface expression by flow cytometry.
PRECURSOR_LYMPHOID.mrdStatus: Measurable residual disease by flow cytometry, NGS, or BCR-ABL1 PCR (Ph+). POSITIVE = MRD detected at the trial-specified threshold (e.g. ≥10⁻⁴). NEGATIVE = MRD undetectable.
PRECURSOR_LYMPHOID.cnsStatus: Diagnostic CSF cytology. CNS1 = no blasts, WBC <5/μL. CNS2 = blasts present, WBC <5/μL. CNS3 = blasts present with WBC ≥5/μL or cranial-nerve/clinical signs.
PRECURSOR_LYMPHOID.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. BLINATUMOMAB = blinatumomab (CD19/CD3 bispecific). INOTUZUMAB = inotuzumab ozogamicin (CD22 ADC). CAR_T = CD19-directed CAR-T (tisa-cel, brexu-cel, obecabtagene). BCR_ABL_TKI = imatinib, dasatinib, ponatinib, asciminib. ALLO_TRANSPLANT = allogeneic SCT.
PRECURSOR_LYMPHOID.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
PRECURSOR_LYMPHOID.minPriorSystemicLines: Minimum prior systemic lines (counts induction, consolidation, maintenance, and salvage regimens).

PLASMA_CELL.acceptedDiseases: Specific plasma-cell entities the trial enrolls. MM = multiple myeloma. PCL = plasma cell leukemia (primary or secondary, ≥5% circulating plasma cells). PLASMACYTOMA = solitary bone or extramedullary plasmacytoma. AL_AMYLOIDOSIS = light-chain amyloidosis. WALDENSTROM_LPL = lymphoplasmacytic lymphoma / Waldenström macroglobulinemia. POEMS = POEMS syndrome. OTHER.
PLASMA_CELL.rissStage: Revised International Staging System (R-ISS) for multiple myeloma. I = β2-microglobulin <3.5 mg/L + albumin ≥3.5 g/dL + normal LDH + standard-risk cytogenetics. II = neither I nor III. III = β2M ≥5.5 mg/L AND (high LDH OR high-risk cytogenetics).
PLASMA_CELL.highRiskCytogenetics: Any of del(17p)/TP53, t(4;14), t(14;16), t(14;20), or 1q21 gain/amp by FISH.
PLASMA_CELL.measurableDiseaseImwg: IMWG measurable-disease criteria: serum M-protein ≥1 g/dL OR urine M-protein ≥200 mg/24 h OR involved serum free light chain ≥10 mg/dL with abnormal κ/λ ratio OR a measurable plasmacytoma ≥1 cm by imaging.
PLASMA_CELL.extramedullaryDisease: Plasma-cell tumor outside the bone marrow (soft-tissue plasmacytomas or organ involvement).
PLASMA_CELL.amyloidCardiacInvolvement: Cardiac AL amyloidosis defined by elevated NT-proBNP, troponin, and characteristic echocardiogram / cardiac MRI findings.
PLASMA_CELL.amyloidMayoStage: Mayo staging for AL amyloidosis (NT-proBNP + troponin ± FLC difference). I / II / III, with IIIA and IIIB subdivisions of stage III by NT-proBNP.
PLASMA_CELL.priorTherapyRequired: Therapies the patient must have received. IMID = lenalidomide, pomalidomide, thalidomide, iberdomide. PROTEASOME_INHIBITOR = bortezomib, carfilzomib, ixazomib. ANTI_CD38 = daratumumab, isatuximab. BCMA_THERAPY = belantamab, ide-cel, cilta-cel, teclistamab, elranatamab. BISPECIFIC = teclistamab (BCMA), elranatamab (BCMA), talquetamab (GPRC5D), cevostamab (FcRH5). AUTO_TRANSPLANT = autologous SCT. ALLO_TRANSPLANT = allogeneic SCT.
PLASMA_CELL.priorTherapyExcluded: Therapies that disqualify. Same alphabet as priorTherapyRequired.
